The Boogeyman (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $43,244,282Details
International Box Office $39,100,551
Worldwide Box Office $82,344,833
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $364,250
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $299,368
Total $663,618
Further financial details...

Synopsis

High school student Sadie Harper and her younger sister Sawyer are reeling from the recent death of their mother and aren’t getting much support from their father, Will, a therapist who is dealing with his own pain. When a desperate patient unexpectedly shows up at their home seeking help, he leaves behind a terrifying supernatural entity that preys on families and feeds on the suffering of its victims.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,356,486 (28.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.50 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,205 opening theaters/3,205 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $47,276,194

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 2nd, 2023 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: May 31st, 2023 (Wide) (Switzerland)
May 31st, 2023 (Wide), released as Le croque-mitaine (France)
May 31st, 2023 (Wide) (Philippines)
May 31st, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
June 1st, 2023 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: August 29th, 2023 by 20th Century Studios
MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror, violent content, teen drug use and some strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2757 (cert #53947), 11/9/2022)
Running Time: 98 minutes
Filming location (city or town): New Orleans, LA
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Louisiana, United States
Plot point: Death of a Son or Daughter, Surprise Twist
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 21 Laps Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

High school student Sadie Harper and her younger sister Sawyer are reeling from the recent death of their mother and aren’t getting much support from their father, Will, a therapist who is dealing with his own pain. When a desperate patient unexpectedly shows up at their home seeking help, he leaves behind a terrifying supernatural entity that preys on families and feeds on the suffering of its victims.
